scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/backend && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadpilot/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@leadpilot/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=@leadpilot/backend
